findings.description: Critical: `/events/work` still accepts the SSE JWT in the URL without the contracted token-in-URL mitigations. There is no access-log redaction for `token=`, and the `EventSourceResponse` is returned without `Referrer-Policy: no-referrer` or `Cache-Control: no-store`, so enabling access logs or navigating away from the dashboard can leak the short-lived bearer token. Fix by adding request/log sanitization and setting the hardening headers on the SSE/static dashboard responses.

Critical: each SSE connection registers two EventBus callbacks but never unregisters them on disconnect. After browser reconnects or polling fallback, stale callbacks keep capturing dead queues; once those queues fill, EventBus dispatch tasks can hang and accumulate. Add an unsubscribe/remove callback API on `EventBusService`, or have `sse_event_generator` deregister both callbacks in a `finally` block.

Critical: vendor swimlanes do not implement the required audit-log live activity surface. `agentsByIssueId` is derived only from `issue.claimed_by` plus active worktree heartbeat, `AgentActivity` has no `args_summary`, and incoming SSE audit events are buffered separately without updating the lane data. Multi-vendor child agents and the required latest `audit_log.args_summary` text will not render or update. Thread audit events into the per-agent projection, include operation summary/timestamp, and derive all child agents for the work package instead of only the single claimed_by value.

Critical: the Done column uses `updated_at ?? created_at` to decide the 24-hour visibility window, while the spec requires `completed_at >= now() - 24h` and card timestamps should use completed-at for completed work. A stale completed task updated recently will be shown, and a recently completed task with old `created_at` can be hidden if `updated_at` is absent. Add `completed_at` to the frontend `Issue` type and bucket/render completed cards from that field.

Critical: production kick actions do not write the required UI audit artifact. `SyncPointBanner` only calls an optional `onAuditEmit` callback, and `App.tsx` renders the banner without providing that callback, so confirm/decline outcomes are not POSTed to `/kanban-viz/audit` and no `docs/kanban-viz/audit/...` file is written. Wire a real audit emitter in the app and include the contracted action/class/outcome fields for both confirmation and decline paths.

Critical: the saved-view and audit file-write endpoints stamp headers but do not validate request payloads against the checked-in JSON schemas. `write_saved_view` accepts any `view_payload`, and `write_audit_event` merges arbitrary `event_payload`, so invalid saved views or audit events can be persisted despite the contract requiring schema validation at write time. Validate against `contracts/schemas/saved-view.json` and `contracts/schemas/audit-event.json` before writing, returning 400 on schema failures.

Nit: the outstanding OC-1 dead test copy still exists under `skills/tests/agent-coordinator/test_kanban_viz_endpoints.py`. That path is outside the coordinator pytest tree and now diverges from the real `agent-coordinator/tests/test_kanban_viz_endpoints.py`, so future reviewers can read or edit misleading stale coverage. Remove the duplicate or replace it with a clear pointer to the canonical test file.
